title: CaffeineFilled
description: Do you feel slow? Tired? Drink a cup of your favorite coffee!
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

# This mod adds 29 coffees inspired by real coffees, depending on the cafe you get some buffs or debuffs.

![Mod Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oBe30dB4/images/83faafee2d278f30394805c6fc1ef0ae52b9c075.png)

## Types of Coffee:

**Weak Coffees:** Coffees that are less concentrated or with less coffee beans are weaker, having an unguaranteed chance of giving Speed I

**Normal Coffees:** With more balanced coffee levels these drinks have a guaranteed chance of Speed I and a chance of giving Speed II

**Strong Coffees:** Strong coffees with high levels of caffeine have a guaranteed chance of giving Speed II and a chance of giving Speed III

**Sweet Coffees:** Sweet drinks have a good chance of giving Dolphin's Grace

**Bitter Coffees:** Coffees with little balance between caffeine and sugar are bitter, occasionally giving Weakness I

**Alcohol Coffes:** Coffees with some ingredient that has alcohol in it, occasionally gives Nausea I

## Others:

**Lemon:** Have the same chance of apple drop from leaves but only with azalea leaves, can be farmed using bone meal in azalea leaves with flowers

**Glass Bottles:** Small bottles with liquids used to make coffees, gather up to 64 and hold 125ml

**Cream:** Made from milk it is produced in the brewing stand with milk bottles and bowls, and it's used in some coffees and ice cream

**Foam:** Made from milk it is produced in the brewing stand with cream and bowls and it's used in some coffees

**Coffee Berries:** Can be found in the wild and planted growing into a bush, to use them to make coffee you have to toast them on a smoker or campfire

**Pinkarella Special:** A special coffee that when consumed has a 50% chance of killing you and a 50% chance of giving you Strength V and Haste III, do not drink it while holding the Totem of Undying

# Do I need it? Mocha! Am i under control?

### I have no plans to carry the mod to any past version of Minecraft or Fabric, if you find a bug please report so i can solve it right away.

### **__Do not install this mod from any other site, it's fake and may contain viruses or unwanted software, i only post mods on Curseforge or Modrinth and always go by the name Ruby.__**

# You can use this mod in your modpack freely.
